title.ko: 분사 장치; 분사 장치; 노즐 (노즐이 있는 분무믹서 B01F25/72; 분무에 의해서 액체 또는 기타 유동성 물질을 표면에 도포하기 위한 공정 B05D)
title.en: SPRAYING APPARATUS; ATOMISING APPARATUS; NOZZLES (spray-mixers with nozzles B01F0025720000;processes for applying liquids or other fluent materials to surfaces by spraying B05D)

definition.ko: 구조에 따라 특징적인 장치 B05B3/00, B05B9/00, B05B11/00 두 개 이상의 소스에서 유체를 배출할 수 있는 적합성 B05B7/00 전기적 또는 전기적 장치 B05B5/00 조작이 특징인 장치 B05B11/00, B05B13/00 과다 분무 물질의 수거, 재사용 또는 제거를 위한 준비 B05B14/00 스프레이 부츠 B05B16/00 기타 장치 B05B17/00 아울렛 또는 기타 세부 사항 B05B1/00, B05B15/00 전달 제어 B05B12/00

title.ko: 밸브, 가열 장치 등 보조장치가 있거나 또는 없는 노즐, 분무 헤드 또는 기타 배출구 (B05B3/00, B05B5/00, B05B7/00이 우선; 접촉 방식으로 액체 또는 기타 유동성 물질을 표면에 도포하는 장치 B05C; 잉크젯 프린터용 노즐 B41J2/135; 액체 분사용 노즐, 예. 차량 정비소 B67D7/42)
title.en: Nozzles, spray heads or other outlets, with or without auxiliary devices such as valves, heating means (B05B0003000000, B05B0005000000, B05B0007000000 take precedence;devices for applying liquids or other fluent materials to surfaces by contact B05C;nozzles for ink-jet printing mechanisms B41J0002135000;nozzles for liquid-dispensing, e.g. in vehicle service stations, B67D0007420000)

title.ko: 특별한 형상 혹은 상태의 분출, 분무 또는 기타의 배출을 위하여 형성된 것, 예. 단일적하를 위한 것(B05B 1/26, B05B 1/28, B05B 1/34가 우선)
title.en: designed to produce a jet, spray, or other discharge of particular shape or nature, e.g. in single drops (B05B0001260000, B05B0001280000, B05B0001340000 take precedence)
in flat form, e.g. fan-like, sheet-like
in annular, tubular or hollow conical form
of pulsating nature, e.g. delivering liquid in successive separate quantities
in the form of a fine jet, e.g. for use in wind-screen washers

title.ko: 여러 종류의 방출을 가능하게 하는 것, 예. 제트 또는 분무 (선택적인 효과의 배출구를 가지는 것 B05B1/16)
title.en: capable of producing different kinds of discharge, e.g. either jet or spray (having selectively-effective outlets B05B0001160000)

title.ko: 다수의 배출개구부가 있는 것(B05B 1/02, B05B 1/26이 우선); 배출부의 내외에 스트레이너가 있는 것
title.en: with multiple outlet openings (B05B0001020000, B05B0001260000 take precedence); with strainers in or outside the outlet opening
having selectively-effective outlets
Roses; Shower heads
Perforated pipes or troughs, e.g. spray booms; Outlet elements therefor

title.ko: 분수구(수도꼭지의 비산방지 E03C 1/08)
title.en: Spouts (anti-splash devices for water-taps E03C0001080000)
incorporating means for heating the liquid or other fluent material, e.g. electrically
with means for mechanically breaking-up or deflecting the jet after discharge, e.g. with fixed deflectors; Breaking-up the discharged liquid or other fluent material by impinging jets

with integral means for shielding the discharged liquid or other fluent material, e.g. to limit area of spray; with integral means for catching drips or collecting surplus liquid or other fluent material
designed to control volume of flow, e.g. with adjustable passages
in which a valve member forms part of the outlet opening

title.ko: 액체 또는 다른 유동성 물질의 유형을 변화시킬 수 있도록 설계된 것, 예. 와류가 발생하도록 된 것(유량 조절을 위해 설계된 것 B05B 1/30)
title.en: designed to influence the nature of flow of the liquid or other fluent material, e.g. to produce swirl  (designed to control volume of flow B05B0001300000)
Outlets for discharging by overflow

title.ko: 가동 배출구 요소 또는 가동 편향기구가 있는 분무 또는 산포장치
title.en: Spraying or sprinkling apparatus with moving outlet elements or moving deflecting elements

title.ko: 회전 요소를 포함하는 것 (회전식 출구 또는 편향 요소를 갖는 것을 특징으로 하는 전기 분사 배출 장치 B05B5/04)
title.en: with rotating elements (electric spraying discharge apparatus characterised by having rotary outlet or deflecting elements B05B0005040000)
driven by the liquid or other fluent material discharged, e.g. the liquid actuating a motor before passing to the outlet
by jet reaction
in association with stationary outlet or deflecting elements
discharging over substantially the whole periphery of the rotating member
with spray booms or the like rotating around an axis by means independent of the liquid or other fluent material discharged
with oscillating elements; with intermittent operation
driven or controlled by the liquid or other fluent material discharged, e.g. the liquid actuating a motor before passing to the outlet
with elements moving in a straight line, e.g. along a track; Mobile sprinklers

title.ko: 정전분무장치; 전기적으로 분무시키는 수단을 가진 분무장; 다른 전기적수단에 의하여 액체 또는 다른 유동성 물질을 분무하는 장치
title.en: Electrostatic spraying apparatus; Spraying apparatus with means for charging the spray electrically; Apparatus for spraying liquids or other fluent materials by other electric means
Discharge apparatus, e.g. electrostatic spray guns
characterised by the use of gas
characterised by gasless spraying
characterised by having rotary outlet or deflecting elements
using induction-charging
using tribo-charging
Arrangements for supplying power, e.g. charging power
Arrangements for discharging liquids or other fluent material without using a gun or nozzle
using electric arc

title.ko: 대상물에 액체 또는 타유동성 물질을 작용시키기 위한 설비
title.en: Plant for applying liquids or other fluent materials to objects

title.ko: 동력공급용 장치, 예. 충전 동력 (방출 장치에서의 것 B05B 5/053)
title.en: Arrangements for supplying power, e.g. charging power (in discharge apparatus B05B0005053000)
specially adapted for coating the interior of hollow bodies
specially adapted for coating continuously moving elongated bodies, e.g. wires, strips, pipes
Arrangements for supplying liquids or other fluent material

title.ko: 2개 또는 그 이상의 근원으로부터 액체 또는 타유동성 물질을 방출하는 분무장치, 예. 액체와 공기, 분체와 기체(B05B 3/00, B05B 5/00이 우선)
title.en: Spraying apparatus for discharge of liquids or other fluent materials from two or more sources, e.g. of liquid and air, of powder and gas (B05B0003000000, B05B0005000000 take precedence)

title.ko: 분무피스톨; 방출장치(입자상 물질을 분무하기 위한 것 B05B 7/14; 분사되는 물질을 가열하기위한 수단을 포함하는 것 B05B 7/16 ; 방출장치에 유동성 물질을 공급하기 위한 수단이 있는 것 B05B 7/24)
title.en: Spray pistols; Apparatus for discharge (for spraying particulate material B05B0007140000;with means for heating the material to be sprayed B05B0007160000;with means for supplying fluent material to a discharge device B05B0007240000)
with arrangements for mixing liquids or other fluent materials before discharge

title.ko: 거의 동일평면에서 다른 배출구로 둘러싸인 1개의 토출오리피스(orifice)가 있는 것(B05B 7/10이 우선)
title.en: with one outlet orifice surrounding another approximately in the same plane (B05B0007100000 takes precedence)
with separate outlet orifices, e.g. to form parallel jets, to form intersecting jets
producing a swirling discharge
designed to control volume of flow, e.g. with adjustable passages

title.ko: 입상물질을 분무하기 위하여 설계된 것(B05B 7/16이 우선)
title.en: designed for spraying particulate materials (B05B0007160000 takes precedence)
incorporating means for heating the material to be sprayed
the material having originally the shape of a wire, rod, or the like
by flame or combustion
electrically, e.g. by arc

title.ko: 방출장치에 액체 또는 다른 유동성 물질을 공급하기 위한 수단, 예. 용기가 있는 것(B05B 7/14, B05B 7/16, B05B 11/00이 우선)
title.en: with means, e.g. a container, for supplying liquid or other fluent material to a discharge device (B05B0007140000, B05B0007160000, B05B0011000000 take precedence)
Apparatus in which liquids or other fluent materials from different sources are brought together before entering the discharge device
in which one liquid or other fluent material is fed or drawn through an orifice into a stream of a carrying fluid
the first liquid or other fluent material being fed by gravity, or sucked into the carrying fluid
the fed liquid or other fluent material being under pressure

title.ko: 기체 또는 증기를 본질적으로 혼합하지 않고 액체 또는 타유동성 물질을 방출하기 위한 분무장치(B05B 11/00이 우선)
title.en: Spraying apparatus for discharge of liquid or other fluent material without essentially mixing with gas or vapour (B05B0011000000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 분무피스톨(B05B 9/03이 우선)
title.en: Spray pistols (B05B0009030000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 액체 또는 타유동성 물질을 공급하는 수단에 특징이 있는 것
title.en: characterised by means for supplying liquid or other fluent material

title.ko: 압력을 유지하거나 가압할 수 있는 용기가 있는 것(에어로졸 용기 B65D 83/14); 펌프가 있는 것
title.en: with pressurised or compressible container (aerosol containers B65D0083140000); with pump
having pump readily separable from container
supply being effected by follower in container, e.g. membrane or floating piston
the delivery being related to the movement of a vehicle, e.g. the pump being driven by a vehicle wheel
Apparatus to be carried on or by a person, e.g. of knapsack type
Single-unit hand-held apparatus in which flow of contents is produced by the muscular force of the operator at the moment of use
characterised by the means producing the flow
Membranes or pistons acting on the contents inside the container, e.g. follower pistons
Deformable containers producing the flow, e.g. squeeze bottles
Gas or vapour producing the flow, e.g. from a compressible bulb or air pump
Pump arrangements for transferring the contents from the container to a pump chamber by a sucking effect and forcing the contents out through the dispensing nozzle

title.ko: 이송 제어를 위한 장치; 분무 영역의 제어를 위한 장치
title.en: Arrangements for controlling delivery; Arrangements for controlling the spray area
for controlling time, or sequence, of delivery
for sequential operation or multiple outlets
for effecting pulsating flow
responsive to condition of liquid or other fluent material discharged, of ambient medium or of target
responsive to temperature or viscosity of liquid or other fluent material discharged
responsive to conditions of ambient medium or target, e.g. humidity, temperature
for supplying a selected one of a plurality of liquids or other fluent materials to a single spray outlet

title.ko: 분무 영역의 제어를 위한 것 (B05B3/00이 우선)
title.en: for controlling the spray area (B05B0003000000 takes precedence)
using fluids, e.g. gas streams
Masking elements, i.e. elements defining uncoated areas on an object to be coated
movable relative to the spray area
made at least partly of flexible material, e.g. sheets of paper or fabric
for masking cavities
for defining uncoated areas that are not enclosed within coated areas or vice versa, e.g. for defining U-shaped border lines
specially adapted for vehicle wheels

title.ko: 차폐 요소, 즉. 과다 분무가 분무 대상물 이외의 영역에 도달하지 못하도록 하는 요소 (일체형 차폐 요소가 있는 노즐 B05B1/28)
title.en: Shielding elements, i.e. elements preventing overspray from reaching areas other than the object to be sprayed  (nozzles with integral shielding elements B05B0001280000)
movable relative to the spray area
Side shields, i.e. shields extending in a direction substantially parallel to the spray jet

title.ko: B05B 1/00에서 B05B 11/00에 포함 되지 않는, 분무에 의해 대상물 또는 다른 가공물의 표면에 액체 또는 유동성 재료를 적용시키기 위한 기계 또는 플랜트(액체 또는 다른 유동성 재료를 표면에 적용하기 위한 방법 일반 B05D； 이 목적을 위해서 액체 또는 다른 유동성 재료를 공급 또는 방출하는 수단은, 그룹 B05B 1/00에서 B05B 12/00의 관련한 그룹의 하나를 참조)
title.en: Machines or plants for applying liquids or other fluent materials to surfaces of objects or other work by spraying, not covered by groups B05B0001000000-B05B0011000000 (processes for applying liquids or other fluent materials to surfaces in general B05D;means for supplying or discharging liquid or other fluent material for this purpose, see the relevant one of groups B05B0001000000-B05B0012000000)

title.ko: 조작 유지를 위한 수단; 스프레이헤드의 배치 또는 지지; 공급조작을 위한 부가수단 또는 배치수단(B05B 13/06이 우선)
title.en: Means for supporting work; Arrangement or mounting of spray heads; Adaptation or arrangement of means for feeding work (B05B0013060000 takes precedence)
the spray heads being moved during operation

title.ko: 특별히 중공체 내부를 처리하기 위하여 만들어진 것(스프레이헤드 B05B 1/00 ~ B05B 7/00)
title.en: specially designed for treating the inside of hollow bodies (spray heads B05B0001000000-B05B0007000000)

title.ko: 초과 분무 재료의 수집, 재사용 또는 제거를위한 장치 (노즐과 통합 된 장치 B05B1/28)
title.en: Arrangements for collecting, re-using or eliminating excess spraying material (arrangements integral with nozzles B05B0001280000)

title.ko: 초과 재료가 미립자인 것 (분무 부스용 B05B14/48)
title.en: the excess material being particulate  (for spray booths B05B0014480000)
from moving belts, e.g. filtering belts or conveying belts
comprising enclosures close to, or in contact with, the object to be sprayed and surrounding or confining the discharged spray or jet but not the object to be sprayed

title.ko: 분무 부스에서 사용하기 위한 것
title.en: for use in spray booths
by cleaning the walls of the booth
using electrostatic means
by filtering the air charged with excess material
with means for cleaning the filters by gas flow, e.g.  blasts of air

title.ko: 공기로부터 초과 재료의 분리를 촉진시키는데 특별히 적합한 벽의 사용, 예. 배플판 (침수벽의 사용 B05B14/465)
title.en: using walls specially adapted for promoting separation of the excess material from the air, e.g. baffle plates   (using wetted walls B05B0014465000)
using cyclone separators
by washing the air charged with excess material
and separating the excess material from the washing liquid, e.g. for recovery
using substantially vertical liquid curtains or wetted walls behind the object to be sprayed
with scrubbing means arranged below the booth floor
specially adapted for particulate material
specially adapted for solvents

title.ko: 타류에 속하지 않는 분무 설비 또는 분무 장치의 세부; 부속품
title.en: Details of spraying plant or spraying apparatus not otherwise provided for; Accessories
Arrangements for preventing or controlling structural damage to spraying apparatus or its outlets, e.g. for breaking at desired places; Arrangements for handling or replacing damaged parts
for preventing non-intended contact between spray heads or nozzles and foreign bodies, e.g. nozzle guards
for improving resistance to wear, e.g. inserts or coatings; for indicating wear; for handling or replacing worn parts
Arrangements for agitating the material to be sprayed, e.g. for stirring, mixing or homogenising
using moving elements, e.g. rotating blades
Dip tubes
weighted
with decorative elements
Filters located upstream of the spraying outlets
Arrangements for cleaning; Arrangements for preventing deposits, drying-out or blockage; Arrangements for detecting improper discharge caused by the presence of foreign matter
for removal of clogging particles
using cleaning elements penetrating the discharge openings
by increasing the cross section of the discharge openings
by resilient deformation of the nozzle
using backflow
by reversing the nozzle relative to the supply conduit
using cleaning fluids
discharged by cleaning nozzles
preventing deposits, drying-out or blockage by recirculating the fluid to be sprayed from upstream of the discharge opening back to the supplying means

title.ko: 분무 장치의 설치, 지지 또는 유지를 위한 배치
title.en: Arrangements for mounting, supporting or holding spraying apparatus
Arrangements for supporting spraying apparatus, e.g. suction cups
ground-penetrating
designed to be placed on the ground
of variable length
Handgrips
Mounting arrangements for fluid connection of the spraying apparatus or its outlets to flow conduits
whereby the jet can be oriented
using universal joints
whereby the flow conduit length is changeable
the spraying apparatus or its outlet axis being perpendicular to the flow conduit

title.ko: 분무 헤드의 위치 조정을 위한 장치 (B05B15/628, B05B15/652, B05B15/656 이 우선)
title.en: Arrangements for adjusting the position of spray heads (B05B0015628000, B05B0015652000, B05B0015656000 take precedence)
Arrangements for moving spray heads automatically to or from the working position
using hydraulic or pneumatic means
driven by the discharged fluid
Arrangements in which the spray area is not enclosed, e.g. spray tables

title.ko: 분무 부스 (분무 부스의 과도한 분무 재료 수집, 재사용 또는 제거를 위한 장치 B05B14/40)
title.en: Spray booths (arrangements for collecting, re-using or eliminating excess spraying material in spray booths B05B0014400000)
Arrangements for spraying in combination with other operations, e.g. drying; Arrangements enabling a combination of spraying operations
for both automatic and manual spraying

title.ko: 이를 위해 특별히 적합한 구성 요소, 예. 바닥, 벽 또는 천장 (부스 안으로의 공기 유입을 필터링하는 천장 요소 B05B16/60; 과도한 재료의 분리를 촉진하기 위해 특별히 적합한 벽 B05B14/44)
title.en: Construction elements specially adapted therefor, e.g. floors, walls or ceilings   (ceiling elements filtering inflow of air into the booth B05B0016600000; walls specially adapted for promoting separation of excess material B05B0014440000)
Ventilation arrangements specially adapted therefor
Movable spray booths

title.ko: 이 서브클래스의 다른 어느 그룹에도 포함 되지 않는, 액체 또는 다른 유동성 재료의 무화 또는 분무 장치(비산중의 분체, 액체 또는 기체의 적하 또는 방출 B64D1/16)
title.en: Apparatus for spraying or atomising liquids or other fluent materials, not covered by any other group of this subclass (dropping or releasing powdered, liquid or gaseous matter in flight B64D0001160000)
operating with special methods
using ultrasonic vibrations

title.ko: 분수(식음용 분수 E03B 9/20; 세면용분수 E03C 1/16)
title.en: Fountains (drinking fountains E03B0009200000;wash fountains E03C0001160000)
